profileSummary: Full-stack product delivery across SaaS, operations, and education, with a frontend and UX bias backed by hands-on backend, data, Git, Linux, and Agile delivery experience.

bullets: Developed SaaS platform features across web and tablet applications.
Worked across the stack using Python, Flask, MongoDB, HTMX, Nunjucks, React, TypeScript, and Sass.
Promoted to UX/UI Lead in May 2023 while remaining hands-on with product delivery and implementation.
Defined UX strategy and led continuous discovery through user interviews, usability testing, behavioural analytics, Pendo, FullStory, and Google Analytics.
Led migration from legacy frontend architecture to a modern React, TypeScript, and Sass stack.
Designed and implemented a scalable component-based design system using Material 3 and Figma.
Worked closely with product and engineering in Agile delivery cycles, balancing roadmap priorities with UX quality and technical constraints.
Oversaw development of a tablet-first React Native operator interface used on factory floors.
Mentored two graduate developers and collaborated with product leadership on roadmap priorities in a Git-led, Linux-based environment.
Returned to support software delivery across the lead management platform.
Worked on Angular-based interface improvements, campaign tooling, and ongoing product maintenance.
Touched Postgres-backed product work, data flows, and day-to-day implementation across the platform.
Bridged UX thinking and implementation across day-to-day product work.
Designed the SoloProtect mobile application enabling lone workers to raise alerts and share live location.
Led UX development of the Insights platform for monitoring worker alerts and safety status.
Delivered interfaces in a C# .NET MVVM/MVC environment while translating UX decisions into production-ready implementation.
Designed real-time geolocation monitoring tools using Google Maps and geofencing.
Worked across UX, UI, and development in an Agile product environment shaped by operational reliability and engineering constraints.
Developed Angular interfaces for a lead management SaaS platform handling complex workflows.
Built dashboards and analytics tools for campaign monitoring.
Contributed to development of a WYSIWYG landing page builder using GrapesJS.
Collaborated with backend engineers working with Laravel APIs and touched supporting Postgres-backed product work.
Designed and developed SCORM eLearning packages for multinational companies.
Balanced visual design, instructional structure, and front-end build quality across browser-based learning content.
Translated stakeholder requirements into polished interactive learning experiences that were ready for deployment.
Deliver engineering and design education to secondary students.
Develop structured learning experiences for students including SEND learners.
Apply clear information design to reduce cognitive overload in complex topics.

education: BA Graphic Design (User Experience), First Class Honours - Sheffield Hallam University
